endpoints.name: GET /{scope}/providers/Microsoft.Security/informationProtectionPolicies
endpoints.description: Information protection policies of a specific management group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SCOPE}} with a real scope.

endpoints.name: GET /{scope}/providers/Microsoft.Security/informationProtectionPolicies/{informationProtectionPolicyName}
endpoints.description: Details of the information protection policy.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{INFORMATIONPROTECTIONPOLICYNAME}} with a real informationprotectionpolicyname. Replace {{SCOPE}} with a real scope.

endpoints.name: PUT /{scope}/providers/Microsoft.Security/informationProtectionPolicies/{informationProtectionPolicyName}
endpoints.description: Details of the information protection policy.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{INFORMATIONPROTECTIONPOLICYNAME}} with a real informationprotectionpolicyname. Replace {{SCOPE}} with a real scope.
